overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro Short MidCap400 (SMDD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Mid Cap 400 index. The fund provides geared inverse (-3x) exposure to a market cap-weighted index of 400 US mid-cap companies. SMDD was launched on Feb 11, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
